chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-933 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 07-09-2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
